metric_definitions.abi_validated_generated_declarations: generated candidates in an explicitly validated ABI batch
metric_definitions.batch_a_public_declarations: source-hash and ABI-fingerprint guarded public declarations generated under the Batch A policy; not hand-reviewed semantic contracts
metric_definitions.batch_b_public_declarations: source-hash and callback-fingerprint guarded public declarations generated under the Batch B policy
metric_definitions.batch_c_public_declarations: source-hash and compiler-probed ABI-fingerprint guarded public declarations generated under the Batch C policy
metric_definitions.batch_d_public_declarations: pre-existing public family declarations requalified against selected source hashes, existing Rustdoc contracts, safe-wrapper audits, and native regression evidence under the Batch D policy
metric_definitions.fully_documented_raw_routines: public raw records with complete routine, argument, and Safety documentation under either the reviewed or Batch A generated-contract standard
metric_definitions.generated_raw_declaration_candidates: records with a compiler-emitted declaration candidate
metric_definitions.preexisting_family_declarations_pending_: legacy family extern declarations that have not passed the R1 documentation and source-hash review gate
metric_definitions.provider_backed_callable_raw_routines: records with a selected provider and an observed native symbol
metric_definitions.public_raw_declarations: reviewed declarations plus Batch A, B, C, and D public declarations
metric_definitions.reviewed_family_raw_declarations: only entries in the hash-guarded correction registry
